a.xlink:title: The engine-agnostic contract a "thinking" entity implements to take part in Tactix systems.
Read-only, side-effect-free snapshot of one agent for a single decision.
The component that makes a pawn a Tactix agent.
Min-heap tick distributor that spreads agent work across frames under a per-frame CPU budget.
Stimulus record and channel interface for the perception memory.
Per-agent timing recorder for spotting which agents and which phases cost the most.
Ring buffer of recent AI decisions for replay scrubbing and post-mortems ("why did it do that?...
A single piece of cover: where to stand, which way it faces, and who currently owns it.
Fixed-capacity squad: a roster of agent handles with roles, slots, a leader and a current tactic.
Static helpers that draw per-agent debug overlays in the world.
Designer-facing asset: a named set of scored actions for one decision context.
Implements the agent debug overlays with debug-draw primitives.
Implements the Gameplay Debugger category: collect agent state, then render it as text lines.
Implements the in-cover decorator condition.
Implements the influence-sampling BT service.
Implements the cover query/claim BT task: build the query from agent and blackboard state,...
Implements step-by-step plan execution for the BT task.
Implements the utility-selection BT task: snapshot the agent, pick the best action,...
Implements the pawn-to-agent adapter: snapshotting UE state into a Tactix::FTactixAgentContext.
Implements the Tactix AIController: scratch arena ownership, handle assignment on possess,...
Implements utility scoring: input extraction, curve building, and the Lewis-compensated action score.
Implements the min-heap scheduler. Contracts live in the header; this file documents the few spots wh...
Per-agent ring buffer of timestamped stimuli with on-demand decay.
Implements the timing profiler: cycle-counter sampling, ring storage, and the aggregate queries.
Implements the decision ring buffer: recording, history/all queries, and the log dump.
Registry of cover points with claim/release ownership and a "best cover for this situation" que...
Per-world owner of the cover system and influence map shared by every agent in the level.
Implements the cover EQS generator: emit each registered cover point as a point item.
Implements the influence EQS test: sample the map per item and score it.
Implements the world subsystem: the soft cover-reservation layer.
